message.content:
C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4 프로젝트에서 RH측 4개 프로젝트(ST01, ST02, ST03, ST_ECU)의 PLC 신호 맵을 수집해줘.

각 프로젝트의 FrmMain.vb와 Module1.vb를 읽어서 다음 정보를 정리:

1. **PLC_READ 함수**: 어떤 D 주소 범위를 읽는지 (시작주소, 개수)
2. **PLC_WRITE / WritePlcValue 호출**: 어떤 D 주소에 무엇을 쓰는지
3. **PLC_VALUE 인덱스 → D 주소 매핑**: PLC() Helper 함수 또는 직접 인덱스 사용
4. **Tmr_Work1_Tick (또는 tmrTool 등 타이머)**: PLC 값을 읽어서 어떤 조건으로 사용하는지
   - 예: PLC(4300)=1이면 시작신호, PLC(4301)=1이면 리셋 등
5. **wStep별 PLC 출력**: 각 wStep에서 PLC에 쓰는 값과 의미

정확한 D주소와 의미를 줄번호와 함께 정리해줘. 코드 수정은 하지 마.

특히 주의사항:
- IN(PLC→PC) 신호와 OUT(PC→PLC) 신호를 구분
- PLC_STRING 조합 방식(Mid로 문자열 조합하여 일괄 쓰기)도 분석
- D주소 기반으로 정리 (인덱스가 아닌 실제 D주소)

content.text: I'll systematically collect PLC signal maps from the 4 RH projects. Let me start by finding the relevant files.

input.activeForm: RH PLC 신호 맵 수집 중

   135→    Public Sub EnsureIndexes()
   136→        Try
   137→            Connection_Open()
   138→            Dim indexes() As String = {
   139→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_SERIAL' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_SERIAL ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(SERIAL_NUMBER)",
   140→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_CTR_BUCKLE' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_CTR_BUCKLE ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(ST01_CTR_BUCKLE_SN)",
   141→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_INR_BUCKLE' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_INR_BUCKLE ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN)"
   142→            }
   143→            For Each sql As String In indexes
   144→                Try
   145→                    Sql_Connect.Execute(sql)
   146→                Catch ex As Exception
   147→                End Try
   148→            Next
   149→            Connection_Close()
   150→        Catch ex As Exception
   151→        End Try
   152→    End Sub

   331→    ''' <summary>
   332→    ''' PLC 주소로 직접 접근하는 Helper 함수
   333→    ''' D4000~D4011 -> PLC_VALUE(0~11)
   334→    ''' D4050~D4061 -> PLC_VALUE(12~23)
   335→    ''' </summary>
   336→    Public Function PLC(ByVal address As Integer) As Integer
   337→        If address >= 4000 And address <= 4011 Then
   338→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4000)
   339→        ElseIf address >= 4050 And address <= 4061 Then
   340→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4038)  ' 4050 - 12 = 4038
   341→        Else
   342→            ' 잘못된 주소
   343→            Return 0
   344→        End If
   345→    End Function

   347→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   348→
   349→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   350→
   351→        hexv = ""
   352→        Do While DecNum > 0
   353→
   354→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   355→
   356→            Select Case na
   357→                Case 10
   358→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   359→                Case 11
   360→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   361→                Case 12
   362→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   363→                Case 13
   364→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   365→                Case 14
   366→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   367→                Case 15
   368→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   369→                Case Else
   370→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   371→            End Select
   372→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   373→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   374→            Else
   375→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   376→                Exit Do
   377→            End If
   378→        Loop
   379→
   380→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   381→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   382→        Else
   383→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   384→        End If
   385→    End Function

   431→           &H4100, &H81C1, &H8081, &H4040}
   432→
   433→        Public Shared Function ComputeCrc(ByVal data As Byte()) As UInt16
   434→
   435→            Dim crc As UShort = &HFFFF
   436→
   437→            For Each datum As Byte In data
   438→                crc = CUShort((crc >> 8) Xor CrcTable((crc Xor datum) And &HFF))
   439→            Next
   440→
   441→            Return crc
   442→
   443→        End Function
   444→
   445→    End Class

   188→    Public Sub EnsureIndexes()
   189→        Try
   190→            Connection_Open()
   191→            Dim indexes() As String = {
   192→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_SERIAL' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_SERIAL ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(SERIAL_NUMBER)",
   193→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_HANESS' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_HANESS ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(ST02_HANESS_SN)",
   194→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_BELT' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_BELT ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(ST02_BELT_SN)",
   195→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_SAB' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_SAB ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(SAB_SERIAL)"
   196→            }
   197→            For Each sql As String In indexes
   198→                Try
   199→                    Sql_Connect.Execute(sql)
   200→                Catch ex As Exception
   201→                End Try
   202→            Next
   203→            Connection_Close()
   204→        Catch ex As Exception
   205→        End Try
   206→    End Sub

   313→    ''' <summary>
   314→    ''' PLC 주소로 직접 접근하는 Helper 함수
   315→    ''' D4100~D4111 -> PLC_VALUE(0~11)
   316→    ''' D4150~D4161 -> PLC_VALUE(12~23)
   317→    ''' </summary>
   318→    Public Function PLC(ByVal address As Integer) As Integer
   319→        If address >= 4100 And address <= 4111 Then
   320→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4100)
   321→        ElseIf address >= 4150 And address <= 4161 Then
   322→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4138)  ' 4150 - 12 = 4138
   323→        Else
   324→            ' 잘못된 주소
   325→            Return 0
   326→        End If
   327→    End Function
   328→
   329→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   330→
   331→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   332→
   333→        hexv = ""
   334→        Do While DecNum > 0
   335→
   336→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   337→
   338→            Select Case na
   339→                Case 10
   340→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   341→                Case 11
   342→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   343→                Case 12
   344→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   345→                Case 13
   346→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   347→                Case 14
   348→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   349→                Case 15
   350→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   351→                Case Else
   352→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   353→            End Select
   354→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   355→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   356→            Else
   357→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   358→                Exit Do
   359→            End If
   360→        Loop
   361→
   362→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   363→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   364→        Else
   365→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   366→        End If
   367→    End Function
   368→
   369→End Module

   243→    ''' <summary>
   244→    ''' PLC 주소로 직접 접근하는 Helper 함수
   245→    ''' D4200~D4211 -> PLC_VALUE(0~11)
   246→    ''' D4250~D4261 -> PLC_VALUE(12~23)
   247→    ''' </summary>
   248→    Public Function PLC(ByVal address As Integer) As Integer
   249→        If address >= 4200 And address <= 4211 Then
   250→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4200)
   251→        ElseIf address >= 4250 And address <= 4261 Then
   252→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4238)  ' 4250 - 12 = 4238
   253→        Else
   254→            ' 잘못된 주소
   255→            Return 0
   256→        End If
   257→    End Function
   258→
   259→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   260→
   261→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   262→
   263→        hexv = ""
   264→        Do While DecNum > 0
   265→
   266→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   267→
   268→            Select Case na
   269→                Case 10
   270→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   271→                Case 11
   272→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   273→                Case 12
   274→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   275→                Case 13
   276→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   277→                Case 14
   278→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   279→                Case 15
   280→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   281→                Case Else
   282→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   283→            End Select
   284→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   285→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   286→            Else
   287→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   288→                Exit Do
   289→            End If
   290→        Loop
   291→
   292→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   293→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   294→        Else
   295→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   296→        End If
   297→    End Function
   298→
   299→    ' DB 인덱스 자동 생성
   300→    Public Sub EnsureIndexes()
   301→        Try
   302→            Connection_Open()
   303→            Dim indexes() As String = {
   304→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_SERIAL' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_SERIAL ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(SERIAL_NUMBER)"
   305→            }
   306→            For Each sql As String In indexes
   307→                Try
   308→                    Sql_Connect.Execute(sql)
   309→                Catch ex As Exception
   310→                End Try
   311→            Next
   312→            Connection_Close()
   313→        Catch ex As Exception
   314→        End Try
   315→    End Sub
   316→
   317→End Module

   146→    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
   147→        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
   148→        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
   149→        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2
   150→
   151→        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
   152→        Dim dlg As New Form()
   153→        Dim txt As New TextBox()
   154→        Dim okBtn As New Button()
   155→        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
   156→        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
   157→        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
   158→        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
   159→        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
   160→        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
   161→        Dim lbl As New Label()
   162→        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
   163→        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
   164→        lbl.AutoSize = True
   165→        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
   166→        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
   167→        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
   168→        okBtn.Text = "확인"
   169→        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
   170→        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
   171→        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
   172→        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
   173→        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
   174→        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
   175→        Dim input As String = txt.Text
   176→
   177→        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
   178→            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()
   179→            frm.ShowDialog()
   180→            ' 설정 변경 후 FLAG 다시 로드
   181→            LoadFProofFlags()
   182→        Else
   183→            MessageBox.Show("비밀번호가 틀렸습니다.", "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   184→        End If
   185→    End Sub

   374→    Sub SerialOpen()
   375→
   376→        Try
   377→            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
   378→                Serial_RFID.Close()
   379→            End If
   380→            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
   381→            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
   382→            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
   383→            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
   384→            Serial_RFID.Open()
   385→
   386→        Catch ex As Exception
   387→            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
   388→        End Try
   389→
   390→        Try
   391→            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
   392→                Serial_Scanner.Close()
   393→            End If
   394→            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
   395→            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
   396→            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
   397→            Serial_Scanner.Open()
   398→
   399→        Catch ex As Exception
   400→
   401→            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
   402→        End Try
   403→
   404→        Try
   405→            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
   406→                Serial_Tool1.Close()
   407→            End If
   408→            Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
   409→            Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
   410→            Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
   411→            Serial_Tool1.Open()
   412→            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   413→            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   414→            tmr_Tool1.Interval = 5000
   415→            tmr_Tool1.Start()
   416→
   417→        Catch ex As Exception
   418→            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool1 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
   419→        End Try
   420→
   421→        Try
   422→            If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
   423→                Serial_Tool2.Close()
   424→            End If
   425→            Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL2
   426→            Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
   427→            Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
   428→            Serial_Tool2.Open()
   429→            Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   430→            Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   431→            tmr_Tool2.Interval = 5000
   432→            tmr_Tool2.Start()
   433→
   434→        Catch ex As Exception
   435→            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool2 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL2)
   436→        End Try
   437→
   438→        Try
   439→            If Serial_Resist.IsOpen() = True Then
   440→                Serial_Resist.Close()
   441→            End If
   442→            Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_RESIST
   443→            Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
   444→            Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
   445→            Serial_Resist.Open()
   446→
   447→        Catch ex As Exception
   448→            MsgBox("Serial Open resist Fail " & PortNumber_RESIST)
   449→        End Try
   450→
   451→    End Sub

   455→            Serial_Resist.Write(":MEAS:RES?" & ControlChars.CrLf)
   456→        End If
   457→
   458→    End Sub

   475→    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)
   476→
   477→        Connection_Open()
   478→
   479→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   480→
   481→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   482→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   483→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   484→
   485→        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)
   486→
   487→        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
   488→            Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
   489→            Rs.Update()
   490→        End If
   491→
   492→        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   493→        Rs.Close()
   494→
   495→        Connection_Close()
   496→
   497→    End Sub

   142→        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
   143→        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
   144→        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2
   145→
   146→        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
   147→        Dim dlg As New Form()
   148→        Dim txt As New TextBox()
   149→        Dim okBtn As New Button()
   150→        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
   151→        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
   152→        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
   153→        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
   154→        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
   155→        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
   156→        Dim lbl As New Label()
   157→        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
   158→        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
   159→        lbl.AutoSize = True
   160→        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
   161→        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)

   163→        okBtn.Text = "확인"
   164→        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
   165→        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
   166→        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
   167→        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
   168→        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
   169→        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
   170→        Dim input As String = txt.Text
   171→
   172→        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then

   174→            frm.ShowDialog()
   175→            LoadFProofFlags()
   176→        Else

   393→    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1()
   394→
   395→        Dim buffsize As Integer
   396→        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
   397→        Dim temp1 As String = ""
   398→        Dim ToolData As Double
   399→        Dim ToolDecision As String
   400→
   401→        Do
   402→            Try
   403→                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
   404→                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
   405→                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
   406→                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
   407→                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
   408→                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
   409→                Next i
   410→                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
   411→                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
   412→                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
   413→                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
   414→                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
   415→                        ToolDecision = "OK"
   416→                    Else
   417→                        ToolDecision = "NG"
   418→                    End If
   419→                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
   420→
   421→                    If wStep = 6 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
   422→                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
   423→                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
   424→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
   425→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
   426→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   427→                                DingDOng()
   428→                            Else
   429→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
   430→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   431→                                NG()
   432→                            End If
   433→                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
   434→                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
   435→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
   436→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
   437→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   438→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
   439→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
   440→                                DingDOng()
   441→                            Else
   442→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
   443→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   444→                                NG()
   445→                            End If
   446→                        End If
   447→
   448→                    End If
   449→
   450→                End If
   451→                temp1 = ""
   452→            Catch ex As Exception
   453→            End Try
   454→            Application.DoEvents()
   455→        Loop
   456→
   457→    End Sub

   464→    Sub SerialOpen()
   465→
   466→        If CheckPing(ToolIP) = True Then
   467→            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool1)
   468→            Trd3.IsBackground = True
   469→            Trd3.Start()
   470→            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
   471→            tMRtool1.Interval = 100
   472→            tMRtool1.Start()
   473→        Else
   474→            MsgBox("IP TOOL ERROR")
   475→        End If
   476→
   477→        Try
   478→            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
   479→                Serial_RFID1.Close()
   480→            End If
   481→            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
   482→            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
   483→            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
   484→            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
   485→            Serial_RFID1.Open()
   486→
   487→        Catch ex As Exception
   488→            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID1 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID1)
   489→        End Try
   490→
   491→        Try
   492→            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
   493→                Serial_Scanner.Close()
   494→            End If
   495→            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
   496→            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
   497→            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
   498→            Serial_Scanner.Open()
   499→
   500→        Catch ex As Exception

   318→    Sub SerialOpen()
   319→
   320→        Try
   321→            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
   322→                Serial_RFID1.Close()
   323→            End If
   324→            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
   325→            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
   326→            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
   327→            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
   328→            Serial_RFID1.Open()
   329→
   330→        Catch ex As Exception
   331→            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID1 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID1)
   332→        End Try
   333→
   334→        Try
   335→            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
   336→                Serial_Scanner.Close()
   337→            End If
   338→            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
   339→            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
   340→            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
   341→            Serial_Scanner.Open()
   342→
   343→        Catch ex As Exception
   344→
   345→            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
   346→        End Try
   347→
   348→        Try
   349→            If Serial_Printer.IsOpen() = True Then
   350→                Serial_Printer.Close()
   351→            End If
   352→            Serial_Printer.PortName = PortNumber_PRINTER
   353→            Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
   354→            Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
   355→            Serial_Printer.Open()
   356→
   357→        Catch ex As Exception
   358→
   359→            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
   360→        End Try
   361→
   362→    End Sub

   379→    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal strData As String, ByVal TargetName As String) As Boolean
   380→
   381→        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
   382→        Connection_Open()
   383→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   384→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   385→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   386→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   387→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & TargetName & " = '" & strData & "'", Sql_Connect)
   388→        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
   389→            tmp = True
   390→        End If
   391→        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   392→        Rs.Close()
   393→        Connection_Close()
   394→        Return tmp
   395→
   396→    End Function

   398→    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived
   399→
   400→        Dim Incoming As String
   401→        Dim ScanData As String
   402→
   403→        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()
   404→
   405→        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
   406→        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData
   407→
   408→        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
   409→
   410→        If wStep = 6 Then
   411→
   412→            'strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN_RH SET " &
   413→            '        "ST03_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
   414→            '        "ST03_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
   415→            '        "ST03_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
   416→            '        "ST03_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "'," &
   417→            '        "END_BARCODE = '" & label_Message.Text & "' " &
   418→            '        "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"
   419→
   420→            ' ECU 바코드 판정
   421→            If ScanData.Contains(srcECU_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
   422→                If srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
   423→                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
   424→                Else
   425→                    srcECU_BArcode.Text = ScanData
   426→                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
   427→                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
   428→                    DingDOng()
   429→                End If
   430→            Else
   431→                NG()
   432→            End If
   433→
   434→        Else
   435→
   436→            label_Message.Text = "Reset Need"
   437→
   438→        End If
   439→
   440→    End Sub

   442→    Private Sub Barcode_Print()
   443→
   444→        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
   445→        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN," & CStr(BarcodeSize) & ",200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
   446→
   447→        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & "^FS")
   448→        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
   449→        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,240^A0N,40,20^FD" & Trim(srcPartName2.Text) & "^FS")
   450→        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")
   451→

   454→    Private Sub Load_Part_Color(ByVal str As String)

   456→        Connection_Open()
   457→
   458→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

   460→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   461→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   462→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   463→
   464→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)
   465→
   466→        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
   467→            If Rs.Fields("ST01_COLOR").Value = srcColorNNB2.Text Then
   468→                PART_COLOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("ST01_COLOR").Value)
   469→                srcColorNNB2.BackColor = Color.Black
   470→                srcColorWDN2.BackColor = Color.White
   471→            Else
   472→                PART_COLOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("ST01_COLOR").Value)
   473→                srcColorNNB2.BackColor = Color.White
   474→                srcColorWDN2.BackColor = Color.Black
   475→            End If
   476→        End If
   477→
   478→        Connection_Close()

   160→    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
   161→        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
   162→        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
   163→        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2
   164→
   165→        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
   166→        Dim dlg As New Form()
   167→        Dim txt As New TextBox()
   168→        Dim okBtn As New Button()
   169→        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
   170→        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
   171→        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
   172→        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
   173→        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
   174→        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
   175→        Dim lbl As New Label()
   176→        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
   177→        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
   178→        lbl.AutoSize = True
   179→        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
   180→        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
   181→        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
   182→        okBtn.Text = "확인"
   183→        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
   184→        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
   185→        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
   186→        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
   187→        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
   188→        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
   189→        Dim input As String = txt.Text
   190→
   191→        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
   192→            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()
   193→            frm.ShowDialog()
   194→            LoadFProofFlags()
   195→        Else
   196→            MessageBox.Show("비밀번호가 틀렸습니다.", "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   197→        End If
   198→    End Sub

   395→    Private Tool1ConnectionStep As Single

   397→    Private Tool1AliveCount As Double
   398→    Private ServerStreamTool1 As NetworkStream
   399→
   400→    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1()
   401→
   402→        Dim buffsize As Integer
   403→        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
   404→        Dim temp1 As String = ""
   405→        Dim ToolData As Double
   406→        Dim ToolDecision As String
   407→
   408→        Do
   409→            Try
   410→                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
   411→                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
   412→                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
   413→                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
   414→                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
   415→                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
   416→                Next i
   417→                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
   418→                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
   419→                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
   420→                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
   421→                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
   422→                        ToolDecision = "OK"
   423→                    Else
   424→                        ToolDecision = "NG"
   425→                    End If
   426→                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
   427→
   428→                    If wStep = 6 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
   429→                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
   430→                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
   431→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
   432→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
   433→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   434→                                DingDOng()
   435→                            Else
   436→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
   437→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   438→                                NG()
   439→                            End If
   440→                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
   441→                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
   442→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
   443→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
   444→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   445→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
   446→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
   447→                                DingDOng()
   448→                            Else
   449→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
   450→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   451→                                NG()
   452→                            End If
   453→                        End If
   454→
   455→                    End If
   456→
   457→                End If
   458→                temp1 = ""
   459→            Catch ex As Exception
   460→            End Try
   461→            Application.DoEvents()
   462→        Loop
   463→
   464→    End Sub
   465→
   466→    Sub SerialOpen()
   467→
   468→        If CheckPing(ToolIP) = True Then
   469→            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool1)
   470→            Trd3.IsBackground = True
   471→            Trd3.Start()
   472→            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
   473→            tMRtool1.Interval = 100
   474→            tMRtool1.Start()
   475→        Else
   476→            MsgBox("IP TOOL ERROR")
   477→        End If
   478→
   479→        Try
   480→            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
   481→                Serial_RFID1.Close()
   482→            End If
   483→            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
   484→            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
   485→            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
   486→            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
   487→            Serial_RFID1.Open()
   488→
   489→        Catch ex As Exception
   490→            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID1 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID1)
   491→        End Try
   492→
   493→        Try
   494→            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
   495→                Serial_Scanner.Close()
   496→            End If
   497→            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
   498→            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
   499→            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
   500→            Serial_Scanner.Open()

  1773→            'Exception processing

  1184→    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
  1185→        Dim serial As String = ""
  1186→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
  1187→        Try
  1188→            Connection_Open()
  1189→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
  1190→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
  1191→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
  1192→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
  1193→            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
  1194→                serial = Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value & ""
  1195→            End If
  1196→        Catch ex As Exception
  1197→        Finally
  1198→            Try
  1199→                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
  1200→                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
  1201→                    Rs.Close()
  1202→                End If
  1203→            Catch ex2 As Exception
  1204→            End Try
  1205→        End Try
  1206→        Return serial
  1207→    End Function

  1465→    Private Sub PLC_READ()
  1466→
  1467→        Dim i As Integer
  1468→        Dim j As Integer
  1469→        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
  1470→        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
  1471→        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
  1472→        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
  1473→        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
  1474→        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
  1475→        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24
  1476→
  1477→        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
  1478→        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)
  1479→
  1480→        szDeviceName = "D4100" & vbLf &
  1481→                                "D4101" & vbLf &
  1482→                                "D4102" & vbLf &
  1483→                                "D4103" & vbLf &
  1484→                                "D4104" & vbLf &
  1485→                                "D4105" & vbLf &
  1486→                                "D4106" & vbLf &
  1487→                                "D4107" & vbLf &
  1488→                                "D4108" & vbLf &
  1489→                                "D4109" & vbLf &
  1490→                                "D4110" & vbLf &
  1491→                                "D4111" & vbLf &
  1492→                                "D4150" & vbLf &
  1493→                                "D4151" & vbLf &
  1494→                                "D4152" & vbLf &
  1495→                                "D4153" & vbLf &
  1496→                                "D4154" & vbLf &
  1497→                                "D4155" & vbLf &
  1498→                                "D4156" & vbLf &
  1499→                                "D4157" & vbLf &
  1500→                                "D4158" & vbLf &
  1501→                                "D4159" & vbLf &
  1502→                                "D4160" & vbLf &
  1503→                                "D4161"
  1504→        Try
  1505→            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
  1506→        Catch exException As Exception
  1507→            'Exception processing
  1508→            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
  1509→            Exit Sub
  1510→        End Try
  1511→
  1512→        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
  1513→        If iReturnCode = 0 Then
  1514→
  1515→            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
  1516→            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
  1517→                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
  1518→            Next iNumber
  1519→            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
  1520→                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
  1521→            Next i
  1522→
  1523→            For j = 0 To 11
  1524→                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
  1525→                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1526→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1527→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1528→                Else
  1529→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1530→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1531→                End If
  1532→            Next
  1533→            For j = 0 To 11
  1534→                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
  1535→                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1536→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1537→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1538→                Else
  1539→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1540→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1541→                End If
  1542→            Next
  1543→
  1544→            tError1 = "OK"
  1545→
  1546→        Else
  1547→
  1548→            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
  1549→
  1550→        End If
  1551→
  1552→    End Sub

  1554→    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick
  1555→
  1556→        Label_Step1.Text = wStep

  1559→        If PLC(4100) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then 'D4100
  1560→            PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "00000000000")

  1570→                If RFID_TAG_ID1.Length = 16 Then

  1572→                    If serial = "" OrElse Mid(serial, 1, 4) = "0000" Then
  1573→                        Init_Control()
  1574→                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", "2") 'PASS

  1584→                End If
  1585→            End If
  1586→
  1587→
  1588→        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then
  1589→
  1590→            ' Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
  1591→            wStep = 3
  1592→
  1593→        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then
  1594→
  1595→            'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then '원본
  1596→            If PLC(4100) = 1 And PLC(4101) = 1 Then 'D4100, D4101
  1597→                wStep = 4
  1598→            End If
  1599→
  1600→        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달
  1601→
  1602→            PLC_STRING1 = "00000000000"
  1603→
  1604→            If OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
  1605→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "1"
  1606→            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
  1607→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "2"
  1608→            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
  1609→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "3"
  1610→            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
  1611→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "4"
  1612→            End If
  1613→
  1614→            If OPTION2_REMOTE = 1 Then '4159
  1615→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 10, 1) = "1"
  1616→            Else
  1617→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 10, 1) = "0"
  1618→            End If
  1619→            '4154 가 1일떄 스타틱 사양
  1620→            '4154 가 0일떄 일반 사양
  1621→
  1622→            If OPTION_SEATBELT_STARTIC = "1" Then
  1623→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "1"
  1624→            Else
  1625→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "0"
  1626→            End If
  1627→
  1628→            Mid(PLC_STRING1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
  1629→
  1630→            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
  1631→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "1"
  1632→            Else
  1633→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "0"
  1634→            End If
  1635→
  1636→            ' CAR 타입 (NX4=1, NX5=2) - 인덱스 5 (6번째 문자)
  1637→            If OPTION_CAR = "NX4" Then
  1638→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "1"
  1639→            ElseIf OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
  1640→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "2"
  1641→            Else
  1642→                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "0"
  1643→            End If
  1644→
  1645→            PLC_WRITE("D", "4150", PLC_STRING1)
  1646→            wStep = 5
  1647→

  1188→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

  1190→            Connection_Open()
  1191→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

  1198→        Catch ex As Exception

  1200→            Try

  1202→                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
  1203→                    Rs.Close()
  1204→                End If
  1205→            Catch ex2 As Exception
  1206→            End Try
  1207→        End Try
  1208→        Return serial

  1420→    Private Sub PLC_READ()
  1421→
  1422→        Dim i As Integer
  1423→        Dim j As Integer
  1424→        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
  1425→        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
  1426→        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
  1427→        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
  1428→        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
  1429→        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
  1430→        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24
  1431→
  1432→        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
  1433→        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)
  1434→
  1435→        szDeviceName = "D4200" & vbLf &
  1436→                                "D4201" & vbLf &
  1437→                                "D4202" & vbLf &
  1438→                                "D4203" & vbLf &
  1439→                                "D4204" & vbLf &
  1440→                                "D4205" & vbLf &
  1441→                                "D4206" & vbLf &
  1442→                                "D4207" & vbLf &
  1443→                                "D4208" & vbLf &
  1444→                                "D4209" & vbLf &
  1445→                                "D4210" & vbLf &
  1446→                                "D4211" & vbLf &
  1447→                                "D4250" & vbLf &
  1448→                                "D4251" & vbLf &
  1449→                                "D4252" & vbLf &
  1450→                                "D4253" & vbLf &
  1451→                                "D4254" & vbLf &
  1452→                                "D4255" & vbLf &
  1453→                                "D4256" & vbLf &
  1454→                                "D4257" & vbLf &
  1455→                                "D4258" & vbLf &
  1456→                                "D4259" & vbLf &
  1457→                                "D4260" & vbLf &
  1458→                                "D4261"
  1459→        Try
  1460→            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
  1461→        Catch exException As Exception
  1462→            'Exception processing
  1463→            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
  1464→            Exit Sub
  1465→        End Try
  1466→
  1467→        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
  1468→        If iReturnCode = 0 Then
  1469→
  1470→            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
  1471→            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
  1472→                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
  1473→            Next iNumber
  1474→            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
  1475→                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
  1476→            Next i
  1477→
  1478→            For j = 0 To 11
  1479→                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
  1480→                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1481→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1482→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1483→                Else
  1484→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1485→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1486→                End If
  1487→            Next
  1488→            For j = 0 To 11
  1489→                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
  1490→                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1491→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1492→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1493→                Else
  1494→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1495→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1496→                End If
  1497→            Next
  1498→
  1499→            tError1 = "OK"
  1500→
  1501→        Else
  1502→
  1503→            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
  1504→
  1505→        End If
  1506→
  1507→    End Sub

1209→    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)
  1210→
  1211→        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
  1212→        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
  1213→        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'
  1214→
  1215→        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))
  1216→
  1217→        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
  1218→            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
  1219→            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
  1220→            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
  1221→            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
  1222→        Next
  1223→
  1224→        Try
  1225→
  1226→            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))
  1227→
  1228→        Catch exception As Exception
  1229→
  1230→            'Exception processing
  1231→            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
  1232→            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
  1233→            Exit Sub
  1234→
  1235→        End Try
  1236→
  1237→        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
  1238→        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)
  1239→
  1240→    End Sub

  1242→    ' DB에서 태그ID로 시리얼번호 조회
  1243→    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
  1244→        Dim serial As String = ""
  1245→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
  1246→        Try
  1247→            Connection_Open()
  1248→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
  1249→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
  1250→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
  1251→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
  1252→            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
  1253→                serial = Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value & ""
  1254→            End If
  1255→        Catch ex As Exception
  1256→        Finally
  1257→            Try
  1258→                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
  1259→                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
  1260→                    Rs.Close()
  1261→                End If
  1262→            Catch ex2 As Exception
  1263→            End Try
  1264→        End Try
  1265→        Return serial
  1266→    End Function

  1325→    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

  1353→            Catch ex As Exception

content.text: 이제 ST03의 Module1.vb에 PLC Helper 함수가 없는 것을 확인하겠습니다. ST03은 PLC() 함수 없이 PLC(4200) 같은 호출을 사용하는데, 이 함수가 어디서 오는지 확인합니다.

content.content: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4\ST03\Module1.vb:248:    Public Function PLC(ByVal address As Integer) As Integer
No matches found
No matches found

content.text:
ST_ECU는 PLC() Helper 함수가 없어서 PLC_VALUE() 직접 사용합니다. ST03은 Module1.vb에 있습니다. 이제 ST_ECU의 PLC 주소 Helper가 없으므로 PLC_VALUE(0) = D4500, PLC_VALUE(13) = D4551 형태입니다.

이제 충분한 정보를 수집했습니다. 최종 보고서를 작성합니다.
